parent.name: Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT

children.name: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix

zh.lifeSummary: 當marguerite de saint aubin於1340年出生時，她的父親Hugues II de Saint-Aubin40歲，母親Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT30歲。她和gobert de corbion至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当marguerite de saint aubin于1340年出生时，她的父亲Hugues II de Saint-Aubin40岁，母亲Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT30岁。她和gobert de corbion至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: aubin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Andre, Normand, Armand, Cecile, Emile, Henri, Monique, Adelard, Aime, Alcid, Aldege.

French: from the personal name Aubin (from Latin Albinus, a derivative of albus ‘white’). This was the name of several minor early Christian saints, including a famous bishop of Angers (died c. 554). At an early date, this name became confused with the ancient Germanic personal name Albuin (see Albin ). Compare Obey and Obin .
English: variant of   Albin  .

variants.name: Albin
meanings: English, French, and German: from the personal name Albin (from Latin Albinus, a derivative of albus ‘white’). In England this is generally a variant of Alban . The usual spelling of the French name is Aubin . The personal name was especially popular in Austria, Lombardy, and Savoy, where it absorbed the ancient Germanic name Albuin (which is composed of the elements alb ‘elf’ + win ‘friend’; compare Alvin ). This was the name of the Lombard leader (died 572) who made himself king of northern Italy, and also of various Christian saints, including a bishop of Brixen (Bressanone) in South Tyrol.
Galician (Albín): habitational name from any of the four places called Albín in Galicia (Spain), from Latin (villa) Albini.

nameMeanings.name: marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When marguerite de saint aubin was born in 1340, her father, Hugues II de Saint-Aubin, was 40 and her mother, Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT, was 30. She had at least 1 daughter with gobert de corbion.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque marguerite de saint aubin est née en 1340, son père, Hugues II de Saint-Aubin, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec gobert de corbion.

de.lifeSummary: Als marguerite de saint aubin 1340 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues II de Saint-Aubin 40 und ihre Mutter Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT 30. Sie hatte mit gobert de corbion mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando marguerite de saint aubin è nata il nel 1340, sua padre, Hugues II de Saint-Aubin, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con gobert de corbion.

ja.lifeSummary: marguerite de saint aubinが1340年に生まれた時，父Hugues II de Saint-Aubinは40歳，母Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUTは30歳であった。彼女はgobert de corbionとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: marguerite de saint aubin(이)가 1340년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues II de Saint-Aubin(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 gobert de corbion(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando marguerite de saint aubin nasceu em 1340, seu pai, Hugues II de Saint-Aubin, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com gobert de corbion.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда marguerite de saint aubin родилась в 1340 г., её отцу по имени Hugues II de Saint-Aubin было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT, 30. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от gobert de corbion.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando marguerite de saint aubin nació en 1340, su papá, Hugues II de Saint-Aubin, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Anne de LILLE de FRESNES SUR ESCAUT, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con gobert de corbion.
